title: Narrative Arc — Agentic AI Requires Human Oversight Architecture
recognition: Agentic systems can interpret goals, choose actions, and continue through multi-step work with less immediate human instruction.
reframe: Greater operational autonomy increases rather than removes the need for explicit governance.
framework: Approval points, escalation paths, authority boundaries, observability, exception handling, rollback, and accountable ownership define the oversight architecture.
proof: The draft separates vague human involvement from designed control points and explicitly requires current technical verification before publication.
application: Organizations can match oversight intensity to consequence instead of applying one undifferentiated review model.
consequence: Clear operating limits make useful autonomy more trustworthy and easier to adopt responsibly.
invitation: Design governed autonomy rather than assuming autonomy itself is maturity.
